zh.lifeSummary: 當Daniel Morrison Jr於大約1668年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可紐波利時，他的父親John Morrison19歲，母親Mary Granville19歲。他於1690年與Hannah Griffin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可勞利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1737年5月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可勞利享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利白費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Daniel Morrison Jr于大约1668年出生在美国马萨诸塞州艾可紐波利时，他的父亲John Morrison19岁，母亲Mary Granville19岁。他于1690年与Hannah Griffin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可勞利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1737年5月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可勞利享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利白費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

en.lifeSummary: When Daniel Morrison Jr was born about 1668, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, United States, his father, John Morrison, was 19 and his mother, Mary Granville, was 19. He married Hannah Griffin in 1690, in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 10 May 1737, in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Byfield, Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Daniel Morrison Jr est né environ 1668, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, John Morrison, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mary Granville, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Griffin en 1690, à Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1737, à Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Byfield, Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Daniel Morrison Jr um 1668 in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Morrison 19 und seine Mutter Mary Granville 19. Er hat 1690 in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Griffin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Mai 1737 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Byfield, Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Morrison Jr è nato il circa 1668 nel Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, John Morrison, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Mary Granville, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Griffin nel 1690, nel Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1737, nel Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Byfield, Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Daniel Morrison Jrが約1668年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスニューブリーで生まれた時，父John Morrisonは19歳，母Mary Granvilleは19歳であった。1690年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスロウリーでHannah Griffinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1737年5月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスロウリーで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーブイフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 로우리

ko.lifeSummary: Daniel Morrison Jr(이)가 대략 1668년 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 뉴버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Morrison(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Granville(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1690년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 로우리에서 Hannah Griffin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1737년 5월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 로우리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이 비필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Morrison Jr nasceu aproximadamente 1668, em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Morrison, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mary Granville, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Griffin em 1690, em Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1737, em Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Byfield, Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Daniel Morrison Jr родился около 1668 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Morrison было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Granville, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Griffin в 1690 г. в местности роули, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 мая 1737 г. в местности роули, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности бифиелд, нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Daniel Morrison Jr nació aproximadamente 1668, en Newbury, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Morrison, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mary Granville, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Hannah Griffin en 1690, en Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1737, en Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Byfield, Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
